raw_consumer_statement: I noticed the following fraudulent charges on my Home Depot credit card issued through CitiBank : XXXX/XXXX/XXXX for {$160.00} XX/XX/XXXX for {$310.00} I called on XX/XX/XXXX and reported the fraudulent charges. I called back on XX/XX/XXXX to check status but it had not been recorded as fraud. I was told it would be taken care of. I called back on XX/XX/XXXX to check status. It had still not been recorded. I was again told it would be taken care of. I called back on XX/XX/XXXX to check status. It had still not been recorded. I was again told it would be taken care of and was given a case number. I was also told the charges would be credited back to my account within 10 business days while the investigation is ongoing. It has been 10 business days. I called to see why they hadnt been credited yet and was told it would be requested again and to wait another 10 business days. This is appalling business practice for a bank.
